SUBJECT: ACTION REQUIRED: Billing Discrepancy Found in Purchase Order PO-998241
    
    Dear Vendor Operations Team,
    
    Our automated system has flagged a financial mismatch regarding document reference PO-998241.
    
    - Stated Document Total: $66,250.00
    - Calculated Verified Total: $65,750.00
    - Total Discrepancy Amount: $500.00 Overcharge
    
    Please review the line-item calculations immediately and resubmit the corrected manifest. 
    The transaction cannot be processed into our ERP platform until this mismatch is resolved.
    
    System Audit Hash Ref: SYSTEM_AGENT_B_AUTO_GEN
